content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时**
迷雾总有消散之时。
彼时，响彻于雾霭里的惨叫会消散，流淌在祭坛上的血迹会被拭净。
迷途的灵魂将得到解脱，找到正确的路途——
前往闪耀的繁星，或留存于真实的大地。

作曲：Starlinear Records/F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Remix：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
企划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Mouchette EP: When the Mist Clears" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: Mouchette EP: When the Mist Clears**
Every mist must one day lift. 
When it does, the cries that once pierced the fog will fall silent, and the blood on the altar will be washed away. 
Long-lost souls will find their rest, guided at last to their true path—whether toward the shimmering stars or the solid earth below.

Project: B.I.A.V. Studio
Composer: Starlinear Records/F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Remix：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时
